product: Endpoint telemetry for custom model serving endpoints is generally available ​
tagline: June 11, 2026 Endpoint telemetry for [custom model serving endpoints](/aws/en/machine learning/model serving/custom models) is now [generally available](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
what_it_does: June 11, 2026 Endpoint telemetry for [custom model serving endpoints](/aws/en/machine learning/model serving/custom models) is now [generally available](/aws/en/release notes/release types). Configure endpoint telemetry to persist OpenTelemetry logs, traces, and metrics from your endpoints to Unity Catalog tables.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
